name: Crock Pot Carnitas
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds pork butt roast, up to 4
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert garlic cloves into the roast or crush them and add to the pot with the meat.
2. Place the roast in the crockpot along with the whole jalapeno pepper and half a bunch of chopped cilantro.
3. Season to taste with black pepper and salt.
4. Pour in the beer.
5. Cook on high for 4 to 6 hours until the meat is fork tender.
6. Remove the meat from the crockpot, shred it, package it, label it, date it, and freeze.
7. To serve, defrost the shredded meat in a microwave or refrigerator.
8. Pile the hot meat on a plate.
9. Serve with steamed corn or flour tortillas and choose your favorites: chopped tomatoes, diced onion, shredded cheese, yogurt or sour cream, lettuce, and cilantro.
